judgment.summary: Cloudflare features strong revenue growth and high gross margins but trades at a premium valuation with negative operating margins.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 0.25 beat the 0.23 estimate by 7.0%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-07-30.
positives: Revenue growth of 33.5% shows strong top-line momentum.
Gross margin of 73.3% indicates high scalability.
Free cash flow (TTM) of $755.00M shows the business is generating significant cash.
Total cash of $4.16B provides a strong liquidity position against $3.52B in debt.
negatives: Forward P/E of 132.08 and Price/Sales of 30.58 indicate a very high valuation.
Operating margin of -9.7% and profit margin of -3.7% show the company is not yet profitable.
Debt/Equity ratio of 230.86 suggests a highly leveraged balance sheet.
Price/Book of 48.57 indicates the stock is priced at a massive premium to its assets.
